tanaka.cardPrompt: Japanese woman early 50s, silver-streaked black hair in a precise architectural updo with zero loose strands, thin rectangular silver-framed glasses, sharp observant dark eyes behind the glasses, charcoal gray blazer over crisp white button-down shirt, small holographic badge on lapel, composed authoritative posture suggesting decades of experience, cyberpunk-subtle aesthetic

webb.cardPrompt: Black man late 30s, close-cropped hair with a neat short beard, broad-shouldered build suggesting former military intelligence background, dark tactical hoodie with subtle tech-company branding, warm direct intelligent eyes, genuine confidence without arrogance

sharma.cardPrompt: Indian woman mid 40s, shoulder-length dark hair with deep auburn highlights, sharp dark eyes carrying crisis weight behind executive composure, navy blue power suit with subtle corporate lapel pin, precise professional bearing, tension visible in jaw despite controlled expression

ghost.cardPrompt: Mixed-race man early 30s, medium build deliberately unremarkable physique, light brown hair cut short without distinguishing style, neutral forgettable features, simple dark gray clothing with no logos or identifying marks, slightly hollow eyes with intelligence underneath, the specific look of someone who has practiced not being noticed

vasquez.cardPrompt: Latina woman late 30s, natural dark curly shoulder-length hair, reading glasses pushed up on her forehead, burgundy tailored pantsuit, always with a stack of legal files or a legal pad, methodical precise bearing, slight forward lean suggesting constant analysis

alex.cardPrompt: Young cybersecurity professional, seen from behind or side silhouette only, smart business casual dark clothing, uncertainty and determination in equal measure, not fully visible — the player projects themselves

images.promptSuffix: neutral expression, steady confident gaze, looking slightly off-camera, portrait composition with dark background, dark navy gradient behind, subtle cyan ambient light
images.notes: Primary neutral portrait — used as style reference for all Tanaka images

images.promptSuffix: serious focused expression, slight frown of concentration, direct eye contact with viewer, high-stakes situation implied
images.notes: Used during crisis moments, lecture scenes

images.promptSuffix: expression of professional concern, slight tightening around eyes, raised eyebrow, empathetic but controlled
images.notes: Used when Alex makes wrong decisions

images.promptSuffix: subtle approving smile, corners of mouth slightly raised, warm but controlled expression, pride visible behind professional restraint
images.notes: Used for correct answers and progress moments

images.promptSuffix: gesturing while explaining, one hand raised making a point, engaged animated expression, illuminated by screen light, in full lecture mode
neutral confident expression, holding a tablet, casual professional stance, dark background with subtle blue server-rack ambient light
excited by a technical discovery, slight forward lean, eyes wide with genuine enthusiasm, coffee mug in hand
images.notes: Used during technical discoveries in Acts 3-4

images.promptSuffix: intensely focused on something off-camera, serious concentration, face partially lit by screen glow, tactical mode
explaining something enthusiastically, both hands gesturing, big warm smile, making technical concepts feel accessible
concern on face, rubbing back of neck, looking at something alarming off-screen, tension in posture
composed executive expression, perfectly controlled, looking directly at camera, power behind the stillness, dark London office background
arms subtly crossed, controlled but defensive expression, slight jaw tension, executive composure barely masking stress
images.notes: Used when her governance failures are exposed

images.promptSuffix: subtle shame in expression, eyes cast slightly down then meeting camera, vulnerability visible despite executive bearing, the weight of having failed
newfound determination, chin raised slightly, direct eye contact, the expression of someone who has processed failure and chosen to fix it
fully composed professional mode, addressing someone with authority, executive communication stance
images.notes: Used in formal meetings and regulatory scenes

images.promptSuffix: deliberately neutral expression, carefully unremarkable, dark corridor background or plain wall, the face you'd forget in a crowd, slight shadow obscuring part of face
slightly evasive gaze, eyes not quite meeting camera, controlled expression that gives nothing away, slight tension in jaw
a flash of intelligence and calculation visible behind the forgettable exterior, the mask slips slightly, eyes sharp despite blank expression
unexpected vulnerability, the careful control slipping, genuine emotion breaking through the constructed ordinariness
resigned expression, the fight has gone out, still composed but acceptance visible, almost peaceful
professional legal bearing, files in hand, reading glasses on forehead, looking directly at camera with analytical expression, warm office background
commanding presence, one hand pointing to make a legal point, serious but fair expression, clearly in charge of the legal dimension
legal concern expression, the look of someone who has just realized the compliance implications, eyebrows slightly raised, file open in hands
absolutely firm expression, jaw set, zero ambiguity in posture — this is the line we will not cross
images.notes: Ethics and evidence chain of custody scenes

images.promptSuffix: explaining legal concepts patiently, reading glasses now on, legal pad with notes visible, measured precise delivery
